title: The Install
notes: 45s cold open. Flashback filter on lines 1-2 (color grade/vignette in edit), snap back to present on line 3. Two-shot on couch throughout except line 5 (confessional, bathroom light) and line 8 (confessional).

lines.speaker: you
lines.text: Okay, I just need this one thing fixed.

lines.speaker: claude
lines.text: Found it. Also renamed twelve variables. You're welcome.

lines.speaker: you
lines.text: I didn't ask you to do that.

lines.speaker: claude
lines.text: You're absolutely right. I've made a note never to do it again.

lines.speaker: claude
lines.text: It's been a great four months.

lines.speaker: claude
lines.text: [CONFESSIONAL] The bug and I have an understanding.
